api: Chatwoot official Swagger (develop) — Application, Public, Platform, Profile, Reports, Survey APIs
scope: Full official Swagger inventory from develop/swagger/swagger.json. Executable coverage remains limited to existing account-scoped Application API streams and typed write actions. Every other official operation is blocked-by-default metadata for later direct-read, binary/file, sensitive/admin reverse-ETL, destructive, duplicate, or disallowed slices; no raw generic HTTP write/read escape hatch is exposed.

operation.reason: legacy/alternate messages path mirrors the account-scoped Application API messages endpoint; use the messages stream.
